books.title: North American Cambridge Latin Unit 3 5th Ed.
books.rationale: This is the student book and contains comic strips and narrative stories in Latin, grammar exercises, vocabulary, and historical notes.
books.noteText: This edition comes with 1-year access to Elevate/Cambridge Go.

books.title: Cambridge Latin Unit 3 Online Resources
books.author: Cambridge School Classics Project
books.rationale: Elevate is a subscription service that includes a digital version of the student book, audios of the stories, online games, and practice. This is helpful for students who are learning Latin independently.
books.noteText:
If you are using an older edition of the text that does not have a code in the front of the book, you must email Cambridge in order to purchase Elevate/Cambridge Go. [cambridgeelevatehelp.cambridge.org/hc/en-gb/requests/ne](https://cambridgeelevatehelp.cambridge.org/hc/en-gb/requests/new)w
Option 2 links to the book that includes digital access to the online resources.

books.title: Cambridge Latin Units 1-4 Teacher Manual (1 Year Digital Access)
books.author: Cambridge School Classics Project
books.noteText: Students using Unit 1 Companion course by Alveary do not need this book. Please call the Cambridge University Press Customer Service team at 1-800-872-7423 (toll-free) or email them at usschools@cambridge.org to purchase. There is also a 4 Year Digital Access option with ISBN 9781316640524.
